metadata.synopsis: In this horrifyingly true story, George (Ryan Reynolds) and Kathy Lutz (Melissa George) and their children move into a house in Amityville, New York, that was the site of a brutal mass murder...what follows is 28 days of unimaginable terror.
metadata.title: The Amityville Horror (2005)

metadata.synopsis: Patricia Clarkson and Bruce Campbell star in this psychological thriller as a remote boarding school is haunted by whatever may lurk in The Woods.
metadata.title: The Woods

metadata.synopsis: A young teenage werewolf (Bruckner) is torn between honoring her family's secret and her love for a man (Dancy).
metadata.title: Blood And Chocolate

metadata.synopsis: In this cult-classic sequel, when the brother of doomed newscaster Karen White, her co-worker and a mysterious stranger (Christopher Lee) set out to save the world from a werewolf invasion, they must first destroy an immortal werewolf queen!
metadata.title: Howling II: Your Sister Is A Werewolf
